title: athyrium serrulatum
intro: Athyrium serrulatum, also known as Lady fern or Mountain lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Athyrium serrulatum include reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for anxiety and stress relief. Herbal preparations of Athyrium serrulatum typically involve drying the fronds and using them in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
